# PHIL.123 ? 80/20 Execution

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** execution_velocity
**Subcategory:** 80_20_execution
**Domain:** EXECUTION_VELOCITY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focus on the 20% of effort that drives 80% of results

## Application
Identify high-leverage activities, deprioritize low-impact work, maximize output per input

philosophy, execution-velocity, 80-20-execution
